channel.title: Energy on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Energy on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Home Energy Monitoring Platforms: emoncms, Home Assistant & Powerwall Dashboard Guide 2026
item.description: Tracking your home’s energy consumption has never been more important. Rising electricity costs, growing interest in solar installations, and the desire to reduce carbon footprints all demand better visibility into how and when your home uses power. While commercial energy monitors exist, they typically lock you into proprietary ecosystems and cloud-dependent dashboards.
